zh.lifeSummary: Ir是Milesius of Spain和Scota a dau of Nectonibus的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ir是Milesius of Spain和Scota a dau of Nectonibus的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Ir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘watchful’ in Hebrew), borne by a character mentioned very briefly in the Bible, one of the chief officers of King David (2 Samuel 20:26). It was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, and is still occasionally used, mainly in the United States. It was famously borne by the lyricist  Ira Gershwin  (  1896–1983 ).

en.lifeSummary: Ir was born as the son of Milesius of Spain and Scota a dau of Nectonibus. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Ir est né, fils de Milesius of Spain et Scota a dau of Nectonibus. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Ir wurde, als Sohn von Milesius of Spain und Scota a dau of Nectonibus geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Ir è nato il come figlio di Milesius of Spain e Scota a dau of Nectonibus. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: IrはMilesius of SpainとScota a dau of Nectonibusの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Ir(은)는 Milesius of Spain(와)과 Scota a dau of Nectonibus의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ir nasceu filho de Milesius of Spain e Scota a dau of Nectonibus. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Ir родился. Его родителей звали Milesius of Spain и Scota a dau of Nectonibus. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Ir nació como hijo de Milesius of Spain y Scota a dau of Nectonibus. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
